title: bromus japonicus var. vestitus
intro: Bromus japonicus var. vestitus, also known as Japanese brome or Japanese cheatgrass, is a type of grass native to East Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus japonicus var. vestitus include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
